summary: Frontend-only testing of LaunchPath Transportation EDU homepage. All critical features verified including status bar, hero section, penalty table, TCO calculator with 5 outputs, and three paths section.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge partially overlaps framing-below text on mobile 390px

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified. Status bar renders (no data-testid='status-bar' but element exists visually). TCO calc: 1-truck $46,850 matches spec. 3-truck $120,550 (correctly ~3x for most components). Section order: Penalty(Y=2065) → TCO(Y=3350) → ThreePaths(Y=3999) correct. Mobile stacks vertically at 390px. No CTA between calculator and Three Paths confirmed.
